dj_text: That was Ryge Og Knep. Now let's pretend we're in a coffee shop with Yndlingsstof.
commercial_text: EXTREME VOLUME RADIO FROM THE SCREAMING DIMENSION! IF YOU CAN'T HEAR THIS, YOUR REALITY IS TOO QUIET!
hijack_text: Brace yerselves for a storm of unbridled freedom!
recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: Yndlingsstof
